name: Lundin Mining Corporation
description: Lundin Mining Corporation is a diversified Canadian base metals mining company with operations and projects in Brazil, Chile, Argentina, and the United States, primarily producing copper, gold, and nickel. Its operating assets include the Chapada mine in Brazil, the Neves-Corvo mine in Portugal, and the Zinkgruvan mine in Sweden, as well as copper assets in Chile. Lundin Mining is a mid-to-large-cap producer listed on both the Toronto Stock Exchange and Nasdaq Stockholm.
